content.query:
delete from opt.claims_mortality_heii_t;
insert into opt.claims_mortality_heii_t 
([token]
,[patient_gender]
,[patient_age]
,[patient_zip_3]
,[patient_race]
,[deceased_state]
,[deceased_state_county]
,[deceased_fips_state_county]
,[date_of_death]
,[IndIsDeceasedFlag]
,[IndIsMarriedFlag]
,[zip]
,[state]
,[StateCounty]
,[StateCountyCity]
,[CensusTractBlockGroup])
select distinct
  c.token, 
  c.patient_gender,
  c.patient_age,
  c.patient_zip_3,
  case when c.patient_age >= 18 and h.AgeInYears >= 18 then coalesce(h.race, 'Unknown') else null end as patient_race,
  m.deceased_state,
  m.deceased_state_county,
  m.deceased_fips_state_county,
  m.date_of_death,
  case when c.patient_age >= 18 and h.AgeInYears >= 18 then h.IndIsDeceasedFlag else null end as [IndIsDeceasedFlag],
  case when c.patient_age >= 18 and h.AgeInYears >= 18 then h.IndIsMarriedFlag else null end as [IndIsMarriedFlag],
  case when c.patient_age >= 18 and h.AgeInYears >= 18 then h.zip else null end as zip,
  case when c.patient_age >= 18 and h.AgeInYears >= 18 then h.state else null end as state,
  case when c.patient_age >= 18 and h.AgeInYears >= 18 then h.StateCounty else null end as StateCounty,
  case when c.patient_age >= 18 and h.AgeInYears >= 18 then h.StateCountyCity else null end as StateCountyCity,
  case when c.patient_age >= 18 and h.AgeInYears >= 18 then h.CensusTractBlockGroup else null end as CensusTractBlockGroup
from opt.claims_t c
  left join opt.mortality_t m
  on c.token = m.input_token and c.patient_age >= 18
  left join opt.heii_t h
  on c.token = h.token 
;


select
  case when a.date_of_death is not null then
    case when a.patient_race is not null or a.state is not null then 'In both MI and HEII' else 'In MI' end
  else
    case when a.patient_race is not null or a.state is not null then 'In HEII' else 'No Records from MI or HEII' end 
  end as source, count(*)
from opt.claims_mortality_heii_t a
where patient_age < 18
group by 1
order by 1
;

select
  case when a.patient_age < 18 then cast(patient_age as string) when a.patient_age is not null then 'Adult' else 'Unknown' end as age_bucket, count(distinct token)
from opt.claims_mortality_heii_t a
where a.date_of_death is not null
group by 1
order by 1
;

select 
  case when floor(a.patient_age) < 18 then cast(patient_age as string) else 'Adult' end as age_bucket, count(distinct token) 
from opt.claims_mortality_heii_t a
where a.zip is not null or a.state is not null
group by 1
order by 1
;

select
  a.token, a.claim_number, a.dos_begin, a.dos_end, a.patient_age, a.patient_gender, a.patient_zip_3, a.date_of_death, a.deceased_state, a.deceased_state_county
from opt.claims_mortality_heii_t a
where a.date_of_death is not null and a.patient_age < 15
limit 10;


-- Add generalization levels to the claim data
delete from opt.claims_mortality_heii_w_generalization_t;
insert into opt.claims_mortality_heii_w_generalization_t
(
  [token]
  ,[patient_age]
  ,[age_lvl1]
  ,[age_lvl2]
  ,[patient_gender]
  ,[patient_zip_3]
  ,[patient_zip2_zip3]
  ,[month_of_death]
  ,[quarter_of_death]
)
select distinct 
  a.token, 
  a.patient_age, 
  b.age_lvl1, 
  b.age_lvl2, 
  patient_gender, 
  patient_zip_3, 
  case when date_of_death is not null then case when patient_zip_3 = '000' then 'xx' else substring(patient_zip_3, 1, 2) end else patient_zip_3 end as patient_zip2_zip3,
  case when date_of_death is not null then 
    case when len(date_of_death) < 6 then 0 else cast(substring(date_of_death, 5, 2) as integer) end 
  else -1 
  end as month_of_death,
  case when date_of_death is not null then 
    case when len(date_of_death) < 6 then 0 else cast(ceiling(cast(substring(date_of_death, 5, 2) as integer) / 3) as integer) end 
  else -1 
  end as quarter_of_death
FROM 
  opt.claims_mortality_heii_t a
  inner join dim.age_ranges_t b
    on a.patient_age between b.age_lower_bound and b.age_upper_bound
;


select distinct date_of_death
FROM 
  opt.claims_mortality_heii_t a 
where len(date_of_death) < 6 --and cast(substring(date_of_death, 5, 2) as integer) not between 1 and 12
limit 10;


delete from opt.claims_mortality_heii_ref_population_no_default_t;
insert into opt.claims_mortality_heii_ref_population_no_default_t
(
	[zip3]
  ,[age]
  ,[gender]
  ,[month_of_death]
  ,[population]
  ,[pop_source]
) 
SELECT 
  coalesce(a.zip3, b.zip3) as zip3, coalesce(a.age, b.age) as age, coalesce(a.gender, b.gender) as gender, -1 as month_of_death, 
  greatest(coalesce(a.population, 0), coalesce(b.population, 0)) as population,
  case when coalesce(a.population, 0) > coalesce(b.population, 0) then 'data' else 'Census' end as pop_source
from
  (
    select a.patient_zip_3 as zip3, a.patient_age as age, a.age_lvl1, a.age_lvl2, patient_gender as gender, 
      count(distinct token) as population
    from 
      opt.claims_mortality_heii_w_generalization_t a
    where 
      a.patient_zip_3 <> '000'
    group by 
      patient_zip_3, a.patient_age, age_lvl1, age_lvl2, patient_gender
  ) a
  full outer join dim.census_population_by_zip3_age_gender_distributed_t b
    on a.zip3 = b.zip3 and a.age = b.age and a.gender = b.gender
union all
select 
  a.zip3, a.age, a.gender, a.month as month_of_death, a.deaths as population, 'CDC' as pop_source
from dim.mortality_2023_by_zip3_age_t a
;

SELECT 
    pop_source, avg(population)
FROM opt.claims_mortality_heii_ref_population_no_default_t a
group by 1;


delete from opt.claims_mortality_heii_ref_population_t;
with base as
(
  SELECT 
    a.zip3, case when a.month_of_death = -1 then zip3 else substring(zip3, 1, 2) end as zip2_zip3,
    a.age, b.age_lvl1, b.age_lvl2, a.gender, a.month_of_death, 
    case when a.month_of_death = -1 then -1 else cast(ceiling(a.month_of_death / 3) as integer) end as quarter_of_death, 
    a.population
  FROM 
    opt.claims_mortality_heii_ref_population_no_default_t a
    inner join dim.age_ranges_t b
      on a.age between b.age_lower_bound and b.age_upper_bound
)
insert into opt.claims_mortality_heii_ref_population_t
(
	[zip3]
  ,[zip2_zip3]
  ,[month_of_death]
  ,[quarter_of_death]
  ,[gender]
  ,[age]
  ,[age_lvl2]
  ,[age_lvl1]
  ,[population]
  ,[data_grp]
)
select 
  a.zip3, a.zip2_zip3, a.month_of_death, a.quarter_of_death, gender, a.age, a.age_lvl2, a.age_lvl1, population, 1 as data_grp
from base a
where zip3 <> '000' and gender <> 'U' and month_of_death <> 0
union all
SELECT 
  '000' as zip3, 'xx' as zip2_zip3, a.month_of_death, a.quarter_of_death, a.gender, a.age, a.age_lvl2, a.age_lvl1, 
  sum(a.population) as population, 2 as data_grp
FROM base a
where gender <> 'U' and month_of_death <> 0
group by 
  a.month_of_death, a.quarter_of_death, a.gender, a.age, a.age_lvl2, a.age_lvl1
union all
SELECT 
  a.zip3, a.zip2_zip3, least(0, a.month_of_death) as month_of_death, least(0, a.quarter_of_death) as quarter_of_death, a.gender, a.age, a.age_lvl2, a.age_lvl1, 
  sum(a.population) as population, 3 as data_grp
FROM base a
where zip3 <> '000' and gender <> 'U'
group by 
  a.zip3, a.zip2_zip3, least(0, a.month_of_death), least(0, a.quarter_of_death), a.gender, a.age, a.age_lvl2, a.age_lvl1
union all
SELECT 
  a.zip3, a.zip2_zip3, a.month_of_death, a.quarter_of_death, 'U' as gender, a.age, a.age_lvl2, a.age_lvl1, 
  sum(a.population) as population, 4 as data_grp
FROM base a
where zip3 <> '000' and month_of_death <> 0
group by 
  a.zip3, a.zip2_zip3, a.month_of_death, a.quarter_of_death, a.age, a.age_lvl2, a.age_lvl1
union all
SELECT 
  '000' as zip3, 'xx' as zip2_zip3, least(0, a.month_of_death) as month_of_death, least(0, a.quarter_of_death) as quarter_of_death, gender, a.age, a.age_lvl2, a.age_lvl1, 
  sum(a.population) as population, 5 as data_grp
FROM base a
where gender <> 'U'
group by 
  least(0, a.month_of_death), least(0, a.quarter_of_death), a.gender, a.age, a.age_lvl2, a.age_lvl1
union all
SELECT 
  '000' as zip3, 'xx' as zip2_zip3, a.month_of_death, a.quarter_of_death, 'U' as gender, a.age, a.age_lvl2, a.age_lvl1, 
  sum(a.population) as population, 6 as data_grp
FROM base a
where month_of_death <> 0
group by 
  a.month_of_death, a.quarter_of_death, a.age, a.age_lvl2, a.age_lvl1
union all
SELECT 
  a.zip3, a.zip2_zip3, least(0, a.month_of_death) as month_of_death, least(0, a.quarter_of_death) as quarter_of_death, 'U' as gender, a.age, a.age_lvl2, a.age_lvl1, 
  sum(a.population) as population, 7 as data_grp
FROM base a
where zip3 <> '000'
group by 
  a.zip3, a.zip2_zip3, least(0, a.month_of_death), least(0, a.quarter_of_death), a.age, a.age_lvl2, a.age_lvl1
union all
SELECT 
  '000' as zip3, 'xx' as zip2_zip3, least(0, a.month_of_death) as month_of_death, least(0, a.quarter_of_death) as quarter_of_death, 'U' as gender, a.age, a.age_lvl2, a.age_lvl1, 
  sum(a.population) as population, 8 as data_grp
FROM base a
group by 
  least(0, a.month_of_death), least(0, a.quarter_of_death), a.age, a.age_lvl2, a.age_lvl1
;



-- claim dimension table for generalization levels with corresponding losses
delete from opt.claims_mortality_heii_feature_generalization_t;
insert into opt.claims_mortality_heii_feature_generalization_t
(
	[feature]
  ,[column_name]
  ,[ref_column_name]
  ,[level]
  ,[mask]
  ,[generalization_in_src]
)
select 'gender' as feature, null as column_name, null as ref_column_name, 0 as level, null as mask, null as generalization_in_src
union all
select 'gender' as feature, 'patient_gender' as column_name, 'gender' as ref_column_name, 1 as level, 'U' as mask, null as generalization_in_src
union all
select 'zip' as feature, null as column_name, null as ref_column_name, 0 as level, null as mask, null as generalization_in_src
union all
select 'zip' as feature, 'patient_zip2_zip3' as column_name, 'zip2_zip3' as ref_column_name, 1 as level, '000' as mask, null as generalization_in_src
union all
select 'zip' as feature, 'patient_zip_3' as column_name, 'zip3' as ref_column_name, 2 as level, '000' as mask, null as generalization_in_src
-- loss and generalization for age
union all
select 'age' as feature, null as column_name, null as ref_column_name, 0 as level, null as mask, null as generalization_in_src
union all
select 'age' as feature, 'age_lvl1' as column_name, 'age_lvl1' as ref_column_name, 1 as level, null as mask, null as generalization_in_src
union all
select 'age' as feature, 'age_lvl2' as column_name, 'age_lvl2' as ref_column_name, 2 as level, null as mask, null as generalization_in_src
union all
select 'age' as feature, 'patient_age' as column_name, 'age' as ref_column_name, 3 as level, null as mask, null as generalization_in_src
union all
select 'month_of_death' as feature, null as column_name, null as ref_column_name, 0 as level, null as mask, null as generalization_in_src
union all
select 'month_of_death' as feature, 'quarter_of_death' as column_name, 'quarter_of_death' as ref_column_name, 1 as level, null as mask, null as generalization_in_src
union all
select 'month_of_death' as feature, 'month_of_death' as column_name, 'month_of_death' as ref_column_name, 2 as level, null as mask, null as generalization_in_src
;


-- create table opt.claims_mortality_heii_feature_weight_t as 
-- select *
-- from opt.claims_heii_feature_weight_t;

-- insert into opt.claims_mortality_heii_feature_weight_t
-- values ('month_of_death', 0.5, 'All', 5);

-- update opt.claims_mortality_heii_feature_weight_t set number_of_features = 5 where true;







select * 
from opt.claims_heii_suppression_grid_t;


-----------------------
------ zip2 part ------
drop table opt.claims_mortality_heii_suppression_grid_t;
create table opt.claims_mortality_heii_suppression_grid_t
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
) as 
SELECT data.token, data.age, data.patient_gender, data.patient_zip_3, data.death_time, ref.population,
  case when coalesce(ref.population, 0) < 3 and data.cnt_patients < 3 then 'Yes' else 'No' end as high_risk
FROM 
(     
  SELECT a.token, a.patient_age as age, a.patient_gender, a.patient_zip2_zip3 as patient_zip_3, a.month_of_death as death_time, b.cnt_patients
  FROM opt.claims_mortality_heii_w_generalization_t a
  inner join (
    select patient_age, patient_zip2_zip3, patient_gender, month_of_death, count(distinct token) as cnt_patients
    FROM opt.claims_mortality_heii_w_generalization_t 
    group by patient_age, patient_zip2_zip3, patient_gender, month_of_death
  ) b
    on a.patient_age = b.patient_age and a.patient_zip2_zip3 = b.patient_zip2_zip3 and a.patient_gender = b.patient_gender and a.month_of_death = b.month_of_death
  where a.month_of_death >= 0
) AS data 
left JOIN 
(     
  SELECT age AS age, gender, zip2_zip3 AS zip, month_of_death as death_time, SUM(population) / COUNT(DISTINCT data_grp)     AS population     
  FROM opt.claims_mortality_heii_ref_population_t     
  GROUP BY age, zip2_zip3, gender, month_of_death     
) AS ref     
  ON data.age = ref.age and data.patient_gender = ref.gender and data.patient_zip_3 = ref.zip and data.death_time = ref.death_time
-- WHERE      ifnull(ref.population, 0) < 3
;


with tab as
(
  select age, high_risk, count(distinct token) as cnt_patients from opt.claims_mortality_heii_suppression_grid_t 
  group by age, high_risk
),
total as
(
  select age, count(distinct token) as cnt_patients from opt.claims_mortality_heii_suppression_grid_t 
  group by age
)
select a.age, a.high_risk, a.cnt_patients, b.cnt_patients, a.cnt_patients * 1.0 / b.cnt_patients as risk_percentage
from tab a
inner join total b
on a.age = b.age
order by a.age, a.high_risk
;


with tab as
(
  select high_risk, count(distinct token) as cnt_patients from opt.claims_mortality_heii_suppression_grid_t 
  group by high_risk
),
total as
(
  select count(distinct token) as cnt_patients from opt.claims_mortality_heii_suppression_grid_t 
)
select a.high_risk, a.cnt_patients, b.cnt_patients, a.cnt_patients * 1.0 / b.cnt_patients as risk_percentage
from tab a
cross join total b
order by a.high_risk
;
